meta.title: Chia-In Auto Repair — Trusted service & quality used vehicles
meta.description: Chia-In Auto Repair: family-owned full-service auto shop and used vehicles.

home.tagline: Trusted auto repair & quality used vehicles
home.intro: Chia-In Auto Repair is your family-owned, full-service shop for honest repairs and quality used vehicles. Expert technicians, fair prices.
home.servicesSubhead: Clear, customer-friendly service categories for everyday car care.

servicesCards.title: Oil Change & Maintenance
servicesCards.description: Routine maintenance, oil changes, fluid checks, filters, and basic inspections.

servicesCards.title: Brake Repair
servicesCards.description: Brake pads, rotors, brake noise, soft brake pedal, and brake warning light concerns.

servicesCards.title: Check Engine Light & Diagnostics
servicesCards.description: Diagnostic scans and troubleshooting to identify the cause of warning lights or performance issues.

servicesCards.title: Battery & Starting Issues
servicesCards.description: Battery testing, alternator issues, starter problems, and cars that will not start.

servicesCards.title: Tires & Alignment
servicesCards.description: Tire replacement, balancing, rotation, wheel alignment, uneven wear, and pulling while driving.

servicesCards.title: A/C & Heating
servicesCards.description: Air conditioning, heater problems, weak airflow, strange smells, or temperature issues.

servicesCards.title: Suspension & Steering
servicesCards.description: Shaking, pulling, rough ride, clunking noises, steering problems, and suspension repairs.

servicesCards.title: General Auto Repair
servicesCards.description: General repair and troubleshooting for common vehicle issues.

home.servicesFallback: Don’t see what you need? We handle most general repairs and diagnostics. Tell us what’s going on with your car and we’ll let you know if we can help.
home.noVehicles: No vehicles listed yet. Check back soon.

inventory.title: Used vehicles
inventory.subtitle: All vehicles fully inspected by our technicians.
inventory.empty: No vehicles in stock right now.
inventory.emptySub: New inventory coming soon — check back!

vehicle.interestedBlurb: Call us to schedule a test drive or to ask any questions.
vehicle.notFoundSub: It may have already been sold.

oil-change.title: Oil change & routine maintenance
oil-change.blurb: Keep your engine healthy. Synthetic and conventional, fluid checks included.

brakes.title: Brake service
brakes.blurb: Pads, rotors, calipers — full brake system inspection and replacement.

tires.title: Tires & alignment
tires.blurb: New tires, rotation, balancing, and 4-wheel alignment.

diagnostics.title: Engine diagnostics
diagnostics.blurb: Check-engine light? Full computer scan and root-cause repair.

used-vehicles.title: Quality used vehicles
used-vehicles.blurb: Hand-picked, inspected used cars and trucks. See current inventory.
